# NASC for Power Solutions

> Official company profile for NASC for Power Solutions.
> Audience: oil and gas operators, procurement teams, and technical decision-makers.

## Company Snapshot
- Name: NASC for Power Solutions
- Region: Syria (Damascus)
- Focus: operator-focused field execution in oil and gas
- Core strengths: disciplined execution, HSEQ compliance, practical delivery

## Services
- Pipeline Construction
- Surface Facilities
- Advanced Sludge Treatment
- Water Injection Services
- Manpower & Supply
- HSEQ Commitment

## Leadership
- Eng. Maher Alwan, Chief Executive Officer
- Public profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/eng-maher-alwan-b438b111/?skipRedirect=true

## Contact
- Email: Maher@nas-c.com
- Mobile: +963991997650
- Address: Damascus, Dummar Project, Syria

## Canonical URL
- https://www.nas-c.com/
